title: shorea stenoptera var. scabra
intro: Shorea stenoptera var. scabra, also known as the Kalampag tree, is a variety of tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae and is native to the Philippines. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Shorea stenoptera var. scabra include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
